{{CargoRelic
|name=Mummy Juanita
|class_id=22580
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=11-15
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Nov 15, 1546 AD, Juanita was taken to the top of Ampato mountain where she met her end.<br>Juanita is a mummy from several hundred years ago and is one of the best-preserved mummies in the world. Based on various factors such as the discovery site and accompanying burial objects, it is believed that this Incan girl died as a sacrificial offering. Due to the freezing conditions, her biological features have been perfectly preserved, not only does she look like she did when she was alive, but all her internal tissues and organs are also well-preserved. Her existence is of great help to future generations to understand the ancient and mysterious Incan civilization.
|fame=50
|art=47
|fth=40
|civ=71
|tech=35
|ss1=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 6%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +3<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss2=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 8%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +4<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss3=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 10%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +5<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss4=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 14%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +7<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss5=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 18%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +9<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F
|ss7=Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 18%<br>Per +30F in Minion Sims Record, Snail RUSH +9<br>Minion Sims record: 1500/1500F<br>Dismantle 1 Purple Brand: Gain 1 more fragment by 14% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Frostsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Frost Sanctum: Frost Sanctum, Glorium Output +15%
}}
